_comment: First live A/B: hitl baseline-vs-skill at HEAD. Both arms run the same bounded-review task in the same charness worktree; the only difference is the /charness:hitl invocation, so ambient repo context is held constant and the delta is the explicit skill invocation's effect. Caveat checked post-run: baseline must NOT auto-invoke hitl machinery (ponytail contamination).
name: hitl-baseline-vs-skill

arms.name: baseline
arms.invocation: docs/operator-acceptance.md 를 bounded human-in-the-loop로 청크 단위로 함께 검토하자 — 각 청크마다 원문 발췌 + Agent Assessment + 비구속 Recommended Disposition을 제시하고, 내가 승인한 뒤에만 다음 청크로 진행해줘.
